items.title: Research Assistant
items.organisation: Central Department of Environmental Science, Tribhuvan University
items.description: Conducted field research on sediment dynamics and hydropower impacts in the Marsyangdi River Basin. Responsibilities included field sampling, GIS analysis, hydrological modelling, and preparation of peer-reviewed manuscripts.

items.title: Environmental Consultant
items.description: Providing environmental consultancy services for NGOs and government agencies on water resource management, environmental impact assessment, and climate adaptation program design.
